zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel於1359年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東時，他的父親John Adams Lord of Llanllywel28歲，母親Lady Millicent Bessylls25歲。他於1418年與Clara Powell在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1424年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel于1359年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東时，他的父亲John Adams Lord of Llanllywel28岁，母亲Lady Millicent Bessylls25岁。他于1418年与Clara Powell在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1424年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel was born in 1359, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, was 28 and his mother, Lady Millicent Bessylls, was 25. He married Clara Powell in 1418, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1424, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel est né en 1359, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Millicent Bessylls, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Clara Powell en 1418, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1424, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel 1359 in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Adams Lord of Llanllywel 28 und seine Mutter Lady Millicent Bessylls 25. Er hat 1418 in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England Clara Powell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1424 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel è nato il nel 1359 nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Millicent Bessylls, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Clara Powell nel 1418, nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1424, nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywelが1359年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで生まれた時，父John Adams Lord of Llanllywelは28歳，母Lady Millicent Bessyllsは25歳であった。1418年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンでClara Powellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1424年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel(이)가 1359년 영국 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Adams Lord of Llanllywel(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Millicent Bessylls(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1418년 영국 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 Clara Powell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel nasceu em 1359, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Millicent Bessylls, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Clara Powell em 1418, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1424, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel родился в 1359 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Adams Lord of Llanllywel было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Millicent Bessylls, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Clara Powell в 1418 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1424 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Adams II, Lord of Llanllywel nació en 1359, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Millicent Bessylls, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Clara Powell en 1418, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1424, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
